gist.headline: The Daily Sweep
gist.blurb: Our automated bot did its daily rounds, sweeping the latest news and community apps into the README.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a librarian or archivist, updating a cozy wooden bulletin board with new pixelated notes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a fresh note to a wooden bulletin board in a lush digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a fresh note to a wooden bulletin board in a lush digital garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background.
